headings.scale: h1: text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter, h2: text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous on sections (py-24 to py-32), dense inside bento cards (p-6 to p-8)
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px sharp borders border-white/10. No massive border-radius. Use rounded-md or rounded-none.

surface_styles.nav: Crystal glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/50 border-b border-white/10. Must be sticky.
surface_styles.cards: Solid #0a0a0a with 1px border. Hover state should subtly glow with cyan box-shadow.
surface_styles.buttons: Primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)]. Secondary: bg-transparent border-white/20 hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#00E5FF].

animations.css_additions_index_css: @keyframes float { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } @keyframes pulse-glow { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.4); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 229, 255, 0); } } @keyframes matrix-scan { 0% { background-position: 0% -100%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 200%; } }
animations.framer_motion_usage: MANDATORY. Install framer-motion if not present. Use staggered reveals (`staggerChildren: 0.1`). Elements fade in and slide up (`y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1`).
animations.hero_specific: Typewriter effect for the H1 or tagline. Simulated terminal window. Floating 3D-like cards with `onMouseMove` lighting effect.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon tech lines. Use with mix-blend-screen, opacity-20, absolute inset-0 z-0 to create a futuristic data grid vibe.

component_instructions.Landing.jsx: Focus on high-impact hero: an animated terminal that types 'Ship Next.js & Node in two clicks', wrapped in a glowing cyan border. Below hero, build a 'Control Room' Bento grid for features (Deployments, Monitoring, GitHub integration). Use framer-motion for scroll reveals. Make it feel like a futuristic IDE.
component_instructions.Pricing.jsx: 3 cards (Hobby, Pro, Agency). The Pro/Agency cards must have an animated gradient border (tracing beam effect). Display Mollie integration seamlessly. Deep void backgrounds.
component_instructions.Auth (Login.jsx / Register.jsx): Split screen layout. Left side: immersive abstract texture or CSS particle field. Right side: minimalistic form (Shadcn UI). GitHub OAuth button with premium hover effect. Focus states on inputs must be cyan ring.
component_instructions.Checkout: Clean inline billing. Neon accents for success states.
component_instructions.Dashboard: Preserve functionality but inject the new CSS variables (cyan focus, JetBrains Mono for data). Tight density, sharp 1px borders.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include these exact data-testids. Apply kebab-case for any new interactive elements.
